claims.summary: Telemetry and sensory connections are distinct perceptual lanes and should retain separate state.
claims.disposition: verify the typed WsLane state and separate telemetry and sensory connection records

claims.summary: An open socket without valid payloads can produce ghost presence unless payload recency is tracked.
claims.disposition: verify last valid telemetry timestamps, latest arrival state, and stale classification

claims.summary: Invalid or unsupported telemetry must not refresh the last-seen signal.
claims.disposition: verify valid-payload-only recency and unsupported-major retention tests

claims.summary: A successful connection must reconcile prior failed-attempt state and its connection identity.
claims.disposition: verify record_connect_attempt, record_connected, and connection-id-aware disconnection behavior

claims.summary: A high-entropy disconnect should be observed as a gap or stretch rather than inferred from socket state alone.
claims.disposition: route a bounded offline disconnect and stalled-stream replay using captured telemetry
